title: Strings 2
description: String has many useful methods. This exercise explores push_str and other String operations.
instructions: Fix the code by using the correct String methods.
hints: You want to append to the existing string, not replace it.
String has a `push_str` method that appends a string slice.
explanation: The `push_str` method appends a string slice (`&str`) to a `String`. Unlike assignment, it extends the existing string rather than replacing it. There's also `push` for appending a single `char`. These methods require the String to be mutable (`mut`).
